=== RUN   TestMyNoopTestSuite
--- PASS: TestMyNoopTestSuite (<TIMESTAMP>)
=== RUN   TestMyTestSuite
=== RUN   TestMyTestSuite/F_TestSomethingSpecific
=== RUN   TestMyTestSuite/F_TestParallelSomethingC
=== PAUSE TestMyTestSuite/F_TestParallelSomethingC
=== CONT  TestMyTestSuite/F_TestParallelSomethingC
--- PASS: TestMyTestSuite (<TIMESTAMP>)
    --- PASS: TestMyTestSuite/F_TestSomethingSpecific (<TIMESTAMP>)
    --- PASS: TestMyTestSuite/F_TestParallelSomethingC (<TIMESTAMP>)
=== RUN   TestX_MySkippedTestSuite
    ƒƒ_psuite_test.go:91: test suite was excluded by user
--- SKIP: TestX_MySkippedTestSuite (<TIMESTAMP>)
=== RUN   TestMyNoopTestSuite
--- PASS: TestMyNoopTestSuite (<TIMESTAMP>)
=== RUN   TestMyTestSuite
=== RUN   TestMyTestSuite/F_TestSomethingSpecific#01
--- PASS: TestMyTestSuite (<TIMESTAMP>)
    --- PASS: TestMyTestSuite/F_TestSomethingSpecific#01 (<TIMESTAMP>)
=== RUN   TestX_MySkippedTestSuite
    ƒƒ_pxsuite_test.go:73: test suite was excluded by user
--- SKIP: TestX_MySkippedTestSuite (<TIMESTAMP>)
PASS
ok  	github.com/mvrahden/go-test/examples/my	<TIMESTAMP>
